purpose: Portable overlay for maintainers extending charness itself through authoring, discovery, and quality work.

recommended_when: A maintainer is creating or revising portable skills, support integrations, profiles, or presets in charness.
The work needs both authoring guidance and repo-owned quality tightening in one bounded workflow.
avoid_when: The task is ordinary downstream product work that only consumes charness artifacts.

notes: Designed as a maintainer-facing overlay rather than a default end-user bundle.
Keeps meta-authoring work explicit without inventing a new public workflow concept.
